EARLY ACCESS
Project Void is currently in alpha. The game is under active development and you may experience server restarts, temporary downtime, and occasional bugs as new features are deployed. Thank you for being part of the process.
Arena Guide
THE CRUCIBLE
Step Into the Arena
FIGHT FOR GLORY
No NPCs. No scripts. A real player on the other side, fighting for the same thing you are. One walks out. One does not.
⚔
Arena PvP
1v1 Arena
Queue up from any safe zone. The server matches you with another player in real time. Both fighters enter at full health with their equipped gear and abilities. There are no second chances. Win or fall.
New
Your Build. Your Fight.
The moment you enter the queue, your loadout is locked. No swapping gear, no changing actions, no potions, no running to the market. What you bring is what you fight with. Preparation matters.
PvP
Every Move is Real
Every hit, every miss, every burn, every heal is calculated on the server. There is no way to cheat, no way to fake a result. The fight is legitimate from start to finish.
Security
Forfeit is an Option. Cowardice Has a Cost.
You can flee. But fleeing counts as a loss, and your opponent takes the win. Every retreat is permanent on your record.
PvP
Your Record Follows You
Every victory and every defeat is tracked. Wins. Losses. Forfeits. Disconnects. There is no hiding from your history. Check your arena record anytime from the stats panel.
New
Disconnect? Still a Loss
Pull the plug and your character stays in the fight. The enemy keeps attacking. You will go down. Disconnecting is not a strategy, it is a guaranteed loss.
PvP
2v2 and 4v4
Bring your party into the arena. Form a party of exactly 2 or 4, then have the leader open the Arena and queue up. All members vote to confirm. You will be matched against another party of the same size. Win or fall together.
New
EARLY ACCESS
Project Void is currently in alpha. The game is under active development and you may experience server restarts, temporary downtime, and occasional bugs as new features are deployed. Thank you for being part of the process.
Security Overview
THE GUARDIAN
Keeping the Void Fair
CHEATERS DON'T LAST LONG HERE
Your gold, your gear, and your progress are protected at all times. Cheaters are detected and punished. Every player competes on equal ground.
🛡
Anti-Cheat
Server-Side Combat
Damage, healing, hit rolls, loot, and gold are all calculated on the server. The client displays results but never determines them. Every fight outcome is legitimate and tamper-proof.
Security
Server-Side Economy
Every purchase, sale, craft, and fish catch is validated server-side before it happens. Prices are checked. Quantities are verified. Duplication and gold manipulation are not possible.
Security
Locked Save Data
Gold, HP, inventory, equipment, stats, and progression are server-controlled fields. The client cannot write to them directly. Saves are audited on every login and before every combat.
Security
Signed Identity
Every action carries a cryptographic signature tied to the account. Impersonation, session hijacking, and name spoofing are blocked at the protocol level.
Security
Real-Time Monitoring
The server watches every action as it happens. Impossible gold transactions, unlearned abilities, attacks faster than the tick rate, cooldown bypasses. All of it is detected instantly and flagged automatically.
Security
Rate Limited
Combat, trading, chatting, and social actions are all throttled. Automated scripts, spam bots, and rapid-fire exploits are stopped before they reach the game.
Security
One Account. One Device.
A second login kills the first session immediately. No multi-boxing. No dual-session exploits. One connection per player at all times.
Security
Strict Input Validation
Every message the client sends is checked against a strict whitelist. Malformed data, oversized payloads, and unexpected fields are rejected and logged. The Guardian trusts nothing that has not been verified.
Security
Device Tracking
Every login and every action is stamped with a device fingerprint and persistent token. If an account is accessed from a new device, the system knows immediately. Unauthorized access leaves a trail that cannot be hidden.
Security
👁
Administrators
Live Moderation
Administrators operate from inside the game with full moderation tools. Player lookups, profile inspections, warnings, and suspensions all happen in real time.
Admin
Instant Alerts
The moment the system flags suspicious activity, every online admin is notified. Detection and response happen in the same second.
Admin
Immediate Suspension
Accounts that violate the rules are disconnected on the spot. Banned players cannot log back in. The integrity of the game is maintained at all times.
Admin
Transaction History
Every buy, sell, equip, craft, loot drop, and login is logged with a timestamp and device identity. Administrators can review a complete timeline of any account at any time.
Admin
Save Snapshots
The server automatically backs up player data before any destructive action. If something goes wrong, administrators can restore an account to any point within the last 30 days.
Admin
Account Recovery
If an account is compromised, administrators can restore the player's full state, lock the attacker out, and force a secure password reset, all without the player losing a single item.
Admin
Permanent Records
Every flag, every warning, every admin action is permanently logged. Nothing is deleted. Nothing is overwritten. The record is final.
Admin
EARLY ACCESS
Project Void is currently in alpha. The game is under active development and you may experience server restarts, temporary downtime, and occasional bugs as new features are deployed. Thank you for being part of the process.
Explorer Guide
THE WORLD
Your Journey Awaits
THE VOID IS VAST
Beyond the gates lie towns full of traders, forests crawling with enemies, and waters hiding creatures no one has ever caught. Every step is a choice. Play it safe or risk everything.
🏠
Safe Zones
Heal and Regroup
Walk into any safe zone and your health is fully restored, instantly. No cost. No cooldown. This is your base of operations between every expedition into the unknown.
Safe
The Market
Browse gears that hit harder, accessories that change how you play, and combat abilities that unlock entirely new strategies. Every zone stocks different gear. The best equipment is always one zone deeper.
Gear
Build Your Loadout
Equip gears. Customize your entire action bar. The difference between winning and losing is in your loadout, and this is the only place you can change it. Choose carefully.
Gear
Crafting
Combine materials into gear that cannot be found anywhere else. Some of the most powerful items in the game are not for sale. They are forged from what you collect in the wild.
Gear
Meet the Community
Zone chat, direct messages, friend requests, party invites. Safe zones are alive with players making plans, forming alliances, and gearing up for their next run. Your next party member might be standing right next to you.
Social
💀
Danger Zones
Explore at Your Own Risk
Hit the explore button and you are in a fight. The creatures out here do not wait. They do not scale down. They hit hard and they do not stop until one side is dead. Come prepared or do not come at all.
Danger
Real-Time Combat
Energy charges, abilities fire, burns tick, heals pulse. Every second counts. Mistime an action and the enemy punishes you for it. Land a perfect combo and watch the numbers fly. This is not turn-based. This is live.
Danger
Risk Equals Reward
Every kill drops gold. Every enemy has a loot table. Push deeper and the enemies get harder, but the drops get better. The best materials in the game come from the zones that scare you the most.
Gear
Fishing
Cast your line into danger zone waters. Trout, Perch, Bluegill, and something else. Something that hides in the deep. The Shadow Eel. Almost no one has caught one. Will you be the first?
Activity
Death is Not the End
Wipe in combat and you respawn at 1 HP in the nearest safe zone. You keep your gold. You keep your gear. You keep everything. Get up, heal, and go again. The void rewards those who refuse to quit.
Danger
👥
Party System
Strength in Numbers
Invite up to three friends. Travel as a unit. Fight as a unit. A full party of four turns impossible zones into conquerable ones. Solo is brave. A party is smart.
Social
Fight Together
When the leader explores, every party member enters combat at once. Each player picks their own targets, fires their own abilities, and makes their own calls. Coordination wins fights. Chaos loses them.
Danger
Move Together
The leader picks the next zone. The party votes. Majority rules. If the vote passes, the entire group travels as one. Nobody gets left behind unless they choose to leave.
Social
Shared Fate
If the whole party goes down, everyone respawns together. One clutch heal can save the run. One bad call can end it. That is what makes party combat unforgettable.
Danger
